instruction: The ellipsis horizontal circle icon has a green checkmark it shouldn't. Get rid of it.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/ellipsis-horizontal-circle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.625 12a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm0 0H8.25m4.125 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm0 0H12m4.125 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm0 0h-.375M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="88,24 98,34 114,18" />
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="88,24 98,34 114,18" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/ellipsis-horizontal-circle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.625 12a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm0 0H8.25m4.125 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm0 0H12m4.125 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm0 0h-.375M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
</svg>
